title: Rename device - Rename, max chars
scenario: Device name supports up to 30 bytes (30 English characters) when renamed in Device Settings > General
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
On the Home screen, tap the device name or gear icon to enter Device Settings.
Tap the device's official name field.
Tap Done to save the new name.
expected: The device's name is changed successfully to the entered 30-character name.
